title: moschosma moschatum
intro: Moschosma moschatum, also known as Muskflower or Musk Thistle, is a perennial herb in the daisy family with fragrant, white or pale purple flowers and a strong, musky scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Moschosma moschatum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used to treat a range of health issues in herbal medicine.
